items.title: Add dark mode to the dashboard
Scheduler regression
items.body: An active workflow can dispatch twice when the daemon restarts before its lease checkpoint is restored.

items.title: Run coordination defect
items.body: When the daemon restarts before restoring its lease checkpoint, an active workflow can dispatch twice.
